"[11] C86-571 START 1185 FOR FORD F15 FOR BLOWN OUT FRONT TIRE "
"[6] VEH NOW PULLED OVER ON GLASSELL OFR "
"[9] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 CA ROADSIDE 714-707-3390 ETA 20 OL"
"[16] 86-572 ALL LANES STOPPED// DRIVER SLUMPED OVER THE WHEEL ON RS // PACIFIC TOW IS 97 // CODE 4 ON RS [Shared]"
"[14] 86-95 VIA LL -- 2ND HAND INFO FRM PACIFIC TOW -- WB 91 JEO KRAEMER [Shared]"
"[6] [Appended, 02:25:13] [1] VEH BLKD OUT BLKG MIDDLE LNS -- NEAR MISS TCS"
"[1] BLK DODG CHA BLKNG #2 - LIGHTS ON // NFD"
"[40] C86-504 REQ UNIT TO RUN TRFC BREAK TO RESET FLARES FOR CT [Shared]"
"[22] C86-503 TRFC LET GO // OFR BLOCKED OFF [Shared]"
"[14] [Rotation Request Comment] 1021 AB TOW // UNABLE TO MAKE ETA // SKIPPED [Shared]"
"[10] 86-504 START CT W/SWEEPER// SAND BARRELS ALL OVER OFR [Shared]"
"[4] [Appended, 02:10:41] [1] SOLO VEH TC -- RP IN GRY HOND CIV TC'D INTO CD // RP ADVS SHE WASN'T PAYING ATTENTION"
"[14] C74-021 W/ RAM - REQ 1185 ON EXP"
"[12] 74-S7 PTY ADV HIT A DISABLE VEH ON RHS - WILL NEED TO CHECK ON THAT VEH AS WELL "
"[9] 74-S7 REQ 1185 ON EXP SIL FORD EDG 6BPM418"
"[3] BLU FORD EDGE VS GRY TOYT PK"
"[5] C75-103 PUSHED VEH TO CHEVRON VALLEY/RIVERSIDE"
"[1] ,WHI DODG RAM PART BLOCKING RT TURN LN"
"[4] GRY MAZD CX5 TCD INTO ROCK / O/TURNED ON ROOF"
"[3] RP WAS LOST IN AREA ON DIRT ROAD "
"[28] POSS 2ND VEH INVD GRY HOND FURTHER EB [Shared]"
"[11] [Appended, 02:08:51] [2] RED TOYT COA VS LIGHT POLE "
"[8] C12-083 1023 CHECKING IF VEH IF STEERABLE "
"[7] 12-S5 HOLD BREAK JSO 83 ASC 83 IF ABLE TO MVOE VEH TO THE RIGHT "
"[1] GRY INFI SDN // 1125 FAST LN - VEH SIDWAYS // OCCUP OOV"
"[1] ,^CLEAR SKY, DRY, COOL, EXTREMELY WINDY, TRAFFIC ADVISORY FOR ALL VEHCLES"
"[51] HE ADVISED BURT VEH 1/2 MI UP SAN TIMOTEO CYN"
"[49] 97-S5 GIVE CALFIRE A 1021 INQ IF THEYRE READY FOR VEH PICK UP "
"[46] 97-S5 UNITS CAN GO 98 / WILL RESPOND FOR CAR FIRE ONCE CAL FIRE CLEARS THE AREA [Shared]"
"[41] [Notification] [CHP]-PER CAL FIRE - GILMAN CROSS OF JRT IS WHERE UNITS ARE STATIONED - NEG OFFICIAL CP [Shared]"
"[35] 97-S5 IF ANY CMS ON THE 60// ADV THAT GILMAN SPRINGS IS CLOSED [Shared]"
"[33] 97-S5 HAVE 202 COLSE AT ALESSANDRO // S5 WILL CLOSE AT BRIDGE [Shared]"
"[31] 97-S5 INQ W/ FIRE 1020 FOR COMMAND POST [Shared]"

"[27] [Notification] [CHP]-CALFIRE IS REQ CHP FOR 1184 // INQ WHERE THE CLOSURE WOULD NEED TO START AND FOR HOW LONG - THEY DID NOT HAVE ANY INFORMATION -- THEY WILL RECALL WHEN THEY HAVE BETTER CIRCS [Shared]"
"[4] [Appended, 22:49:36] [1] BRUSH FIRE AND SAW AN ATV "
